summary.practitioner_community_assessment: The Practitioner Community (47 role refs) represents aggregated industry practice, not proprietary framework.
critical_findings: All 21 RED framework dependencies are CITATION-ONLY
All 322 KSAs are WIDAI-originated (no framework content reuse)
Role definitions authored by WIDAI; frameworks are post-hoc reference mappings
Can exclude all RED frameworks with zero content impact
DAMA-DMBOK (26 refs) and Gartner (14 refs) are highest-value targets for licensing if retention desired
